meaning: 乌普萨拉[瑞典东南部城市]
examples: In the early years of the 1850s, Armstrong, still at uppsala university in Sweden, conducted an experiment with hydrogen atoms.
Among the pioneers are Patrik Juslin, of Uppsala University, and Daniel Vastfjall, of Gothenburg University, both in Sweden.
The researchers, at Sweden's Uppsala University, hope it will aid earlier diagnosis of the disease.
These people (there are about 14, 000 of them) were born between 1915 and 1929 in Uppsala University Hospital.
